ham.subject: Update: Company Leave Policy Effective July 1, 2026
ham.body:
Dear Team,

We are pleased to announce an update to our company leave policy, effective July 1, 2026. The key changes are:

1. **Annual Paid Leave** – Each full‑time employee will receive 25 days of paid leave per calendar year, prorated for part‑time staff.
2. **Sick Leave** – 10 additional paid sick days will be added to the existing policy.
3. **Parental Leave** – A new 12‑week paid parental leave for both mothers and fathers, with a flexible return‑to‑work option.
4. **Remote Work Flexibility** – Employees on approved leave may work remotely for up to 50% of the leave period, subject to manager approval.

Please review the detailed policy document attached to this email and direct any questions to the HR Help Desk at hrhelp@company.com.

Thank you for your continued dedication.

Best regards,

HR Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Crypto Wallet Has Been Suspended, Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued User,

We regret to inform you that due to recent security alerts, your crypto wallet associated with the email address you provided has been **suspended** pending verification. Failure to verify within 48 hours will result in permanent deletion of your account and loss of all stored assets.

To reactivate your wallet, please **verify your identity** by clicking the secure link below:

<URL>

Once verified, you will receive a confirmation email and your wallet will be restored. If you do not act within the allotted time, your account will be permanently closed.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

Security Operations Team
